lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਮਨਿ ਮੀਠਾ ਸਬਦੇ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: amrit naam sadaa man meetthaa sabade paavai koee |3|
lines.english: The Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam is ever-sweet to the mind; but how few are those who obtain the Shabad. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰਹੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੀਵਹੁ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਤਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabad marahu fir jeevahu sad hee taa fir maran na hoee |
lines.english: Dying in the Word of the Shabad, you shall live forever, and you shall never die again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਤੈ ਦਾਤਿ ਰਖੀ ਹਥਿ ਅਪਣੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੇਈ ॥
lines.translit: daatai daat rakhee hath apanai jis bhaavai tis deee |
lines.english: The Great Giver keeps His Gifts in His Hand; He gives them to those with whom He is pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਦਰਗਹ ਜਾਪਹਿ ਸੇਈ ॥੪॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate sukh paaeaa daragah jaapeh seee |4|11|
lines.english: O Nanak, imbued with the Naam, they find peace, and in the Court of the Lord, they are exalted. ||4||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਤਾ ਸਹਜ ਧੁਨਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਗਤਿ ਮਤਿ ਤਦ ਹੀ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: satigur seve taa sehaj dhun upajai gat mat tad hee paae |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, the divine melody wells up within, and one is blessed with wisdom and salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਬਉਰਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur sabh jag bauraanaa |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, the whole world is insane.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਚਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam sachaa man vasiaa naame naam samaae |1|
lines.english: The True Name of the Lord comes to abide in the mind, and through the Name, one merges in the Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਧਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਝੂਠੈ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਨਾ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh andhaa sabad na jaanai jhootthai bharam bhulaanaa | rahaau |
lines.english: The blind, self-willed manmukhs do not realize the Word of the Shabad; they are deluded by false doubts. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਮਾਇਆ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ਹਉਮੈ ਬੰਧਨ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun maaeaa bharam bhulaaeaa haumai bandhan kamaae |
lines.english: The three-faced Maya had led them astray in doubt, and they are snared by the noose of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਸਿਰ ਊਪਰਿ ਊਭਉ ਗਰਭ ਜੋਨਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaman maran sir aoopar aoobhau garabh jon dukh paae |2|
lines.english: Birth and death hang over their heads, and being reborn from the womb, they suffer in pain. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਵਰਤਹਿ ਸਗਲ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਿ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun varateh sagal sansaaraa haumai vich pat khoee |
lines.english: The three qualities permeate the whole world; acting in ego, it loses its honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਚਉਥਾ ਪਦੁ ਚੀਨੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai chauthaa pad cheenai raam naam sukh hoee |3|
lines.english: But one who becomes Gurmukh comes to realize the fourth state of celestial bliss; he finds peace through the Name of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ਸਬਦੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਖੋਈ ॥੪॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak raam naam nisataaraa sabade haumai khoee |4|12|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Lord's Name, one is emancipated; through the Shabad, he is rid of egotism. ||4||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਸਭਿ ਤੇਰੇ ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਕਰਤਾ ਜੋ ਤੂ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun sabh tere too aape karataa jo too kareh su hoee |
lines.english: The three qualities are all Yours, O Lord; You Yourself created them. Whatever You do, comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 4 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fourth Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਅਪਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap varatadaa piaaraa aape aap apaahu |
lines.english: My Beloved Lord Himself pervades and permeates all; He Himself is, all by Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣਜਾਰਾ ਜਗੁ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: vanajaaraa jag aap hai piaaraa aape saachaa saahu |
lines.english: My Beloved Himself is the trader in this world; He Himself is the true banker.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਅਗਮ ਅਥਾਹ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te paaeeai piaaraa amrit agam athaah | rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the Beloved, Ambrosial, unapproachable and unfathomable Lord is obtained. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵਣਜੁ ਵਾਪਾਰੀਆ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਸਚੁ ਵੇਸਾਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape vanaj vaapaareea piaaraa aape sach vesaahu |1|
lines.english: My Beloved Himself is the trade and the trader; He Himself is the true credit. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: jap man har har naam salaah |
lines.english: O mind, meditate on the Lord, Har, Har, and praise His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੁਣਿ ਸਭ ਵੇਖਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਬੋਲੇ ਆਪਿ ਮੁਹਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape sun sabh vekhadaa piaaraa mukh bole aap muhaahu |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself sees and hears everything; He Himself speaks through the mouths of all beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਉਝੜਿ ਪਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪਿ ਵਿਖਾਲੇ ਰਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape ujharr paaeidaa piaaraa aap vikhaale raahu |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself leads us into the wilderness, and He Himself shows us the Way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਸਭੁ ਆਪਿ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape hee sabh aap hai piaaraa aape veparavaahu |2|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is Himself all-in-all; He Himself is carefree. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਸਾਖਤੀ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪਿ ਮਾਰੇ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: aap karaae saakhatee piaaraa aap maare mar jaahu |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself creates the Creation, and He Himself destroys it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਇਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਧੰਧੜੈ ਲਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap upaaeidaa piaaraa sir aape dhandharrai laahu |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself, all by Himself, created everything; He Himself links all to their tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪਤਣੁ ਪਾਤਣੀ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਪਾਰਿ ਲੰਘਾਹੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape patan paatanee piaaraa aape paar langhaahu |3|
lines.english: He Himself is the wharf, and He Himself is the ferryman, who ferries us across. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਬੋਹਿਥਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਖੇਵਟੁ ਆਪਿ ਚਲਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape saagar bohithaa piaaraa gur khevatt aap chalaahu |
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the ocean, and the boat; He Himself is the Guru, the boatman who steers it

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੈ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਹੁ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape aap deaal hai piaaraa jan naanak bakhas milaahu |4|1|
lines.english: The Beloved Himself is the Merciful Master; O servant Nanak, He forgives and blends with Himself. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਚੜਿ ਲੰਘਦਾ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਚੋਜ ਵੇਖੈ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape hee charr langhadaa piaaraa kar choj vekhai paatisaahu |
lines.english: . The Beloved Himself sets sail and crosses over; He, the King, beholds His wondrous play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਅੰਡਜ ਜੇਰਜ ਸੇਤਜ ਉਤਭੁਜ ਆਪੇ ਖੰਡ ਆਪੇ ਸਭ ਲੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape anddaj jeraj setaj utabhuj aape khandd aape sabh loe |
lines.english: He Himself is born of the egg, from the womb, from sweat and from the earth; He Himself is the continents and all the worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਚਉਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 4 chauthaa |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸੂਤੁ ਆਪੇ ਬਹੁ ਮਣੀਆ ਕਰਿ ਸਕਤੀ ਜਗਤੁ ਪਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape soot aape bahu maneea kar sakatee jagat paroe |
lines.english: He Himself is the thread, and He Himself is the many beads; through His Almighty Power, He has strung the worlds.
